features: PERFECT FOR ALL TYPES OF HOME DECOR
PERFECT FOR GIFTING, SPECIAL OCCASIONS OR PERSONAL ENJOYMENT
description: PEONY AND BLUSH SUEDE - Similar in scent to the designer fragrance, this scent features peonies in bloom with red apple and the abundance of jasmine, rose, and gillyflower. Under notes of suede. A very sumptuous and intimate scent. HIGHLY SCENTED REED DIFFUSER – All of our diffusers are highly scented. We believe it’s always nice to be able to actually smell the intense fragrance around the whole room, rather than only where the diffuser is. [CRUELTY & VEGAN FREE] – All of our products are completely cruelty, vegan Free and alcohol-free. Making your experience even better, knowing that no animals were harmed in the process of making our products. LARGE RANGE OF FRAGRANCES – Here at Hampshire Candles, we stock a large range of scents. In fact, we have over 55 different fragrances for you to choose from, all made by hand in the UK. View our Amazon Store for our full selection of fragrances. MADE FOR MORE THAN ONE USE! – Once you have finished your reed diffuser which is usually around 3 - 4 months we also sell refills so you can keep your home fragranced for longer HOW IT WILL ARRIVE – All of our diffusers come in a gift box with 7 black reeds. A 100ml glass jar and a black lid. It will leave your home looking gorgeous and compliment any interior décor! HOW TO USE YOUR NEW PRODUCT – Once received unscrew the black cap from the bottle and remove the cap. Screw the lid back on and insert the reeds into the diffuser. Let them soak for a few seconds before turning them and place in the desired area. Avoid placing in high heat places as this will shorten its lifespan. Place in an area where there is high traffic, this will then release the scent as you walk by. Turn the reeds once a week or when the scent is running low.
